name: unipath-app
description: This is a mobile-first MVP prototype for UniPath.

scripts.ingest: python3 tools/parse_csv_catalogue.py && python3 tools/validate_programme_catalogue.py && python3 tools/ingest_rules.py && python3 tools/promote_rules.py
scripts.ingest:csv: python3 tools/parse_csv_catalogue.py && python3 tools/promote_rules.py && npm run build:web
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.pwa:bundle: npm run ingest && npm run build:web && bash ./tools/package_pwa_bundle.sh
